prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约1214→2944→1536→441→401名，整体呈剧烈波动后大幅前移趋势；2024年因考试模式改革（文理分科→物理类/历史类）位次从1536骤升至441，2025年进一步前移至401，近两年累计前移约1135名，2025年基准位次约401名；本省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年43人→2022年40人→2023年38人→2024年21人→2025年20人→2026年20人，2024年因考试模式改革计划大幅缩减，2025–2026年持平，计划稳定对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，C9联盟成员、国防七子之一；软科中国大学排名2021年第11→2022年第13→2023年第13→2024年第16→2025年第14→2026年第12名，2026年排名回升至全国第12位，稳居全国顶尖工科院校行列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类舆情，未见明显负面冲击；抖音学校热度总排名第10（高热），视频数15条，综合热度453.9万，在国防七子类高校中曝光度突出，反映考生关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常的中关注信号（考生反映投档线暴跌），但2025年已恢复稳定；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共17个学科：力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、控制科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、土木工程A、电气工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、仪器科学与技术A等，工科实力极为雄厚，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）等与哈工大优势学科高度重合的专业持续高热，吸引高分考生报考；贵州省2026年普通高考总人数约29.9万人（较2025年约29.73万人略增），物理类估算约20.84万人（较2025年20.72万人略增），竞争略有加剧；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省，在贵州省招生占比约1.5%（2025年），属跨省招生；作为东北地区顶尖工科院校，对西南地区考生仍具较强吸引力，地域因素对报考热度影响中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次401名、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名回升至第12位、抖音高热关注度、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等因素，预计2026年理科（物理类）最低位次在401名基础上前移至约391名；区间346–436名，主要受学校层次提升和热门工科专业持续吸引高分考生驱动。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次391名处于区间346–436名，建议位次在350名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档院士特色班/尖班；位次在350–420名之间的考生以二档未来技术拔尖班/AI领军班为主攻方向；位次在420名以后的考生需谨慎报考，建议搭配其他院校保底。哈工大2026年物理类招生专业均为工科试验班大类，专业覆盖面广，入校后任选空间大。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1214 → 2944 → 1536 → 441 → 401, showing a sharp fluctuation followed by a significant upward trend; in 2024, due to the reform of the examination model (from arts/science division to physics/history category), the ranking surged from 1536 to 441, and further advanced to 401 in 2025, with a cumulative advancement of about 1135 positions over the past two years, and a baseline ranking of approximately 401 in 2025; the provincial enrollment plan for science (physics category) was 43 in 2021 → 40 in 2022 → 38 in 2023 → 21 in 2024 → 20 in 2025 → 20 in 2026, with a significant reduction in 2024 due to the examination model reform, and stability in 2025–2026, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, a member of the C9 League, and one of the Seven Sons of National Defense; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026, with a rebound to 12th nationally in 2026, firmly among the top engineering institutions in the country; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management-related public opinion, with no significant negative impact; the overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 10th (high heat), with 15 videos and a comprehensive popularity of 4.539 million, showing prominent exposure among the Seven Sons of National Defense universities, reflecting high attention from candidates; in 2024, there was a medium-attention signal of abnormal admission cutoffs (candidates reported a sharp drop), but it stabilized in 2025; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there were 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Civil Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Instrument Science and Technology A, etc., with extremely strong engineering capabilities, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science (high-heat recommendation), Electronic Information/Communication (high-heat recommendation), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (high-heat recommendation), which highly overlap with HIT's advantageous disciplines, continue to be highly popular, attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is approximately 299,000 (slightly up from about 297,300 in 2025), with the physics category estimated at about 208,400 (slightly up from 207,200 in 2025), indicating a slight increase in competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, with an enrollment share of about 1.5% in Guizhou Province (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment; as a top engineering institution in Northeast China, it still has strong appeal to candidates in the Southwest region, with the regional factor having a neutral to slightly positive impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 401 in 2025, the stable enrollment plan for 2026, the rebound of Soft Science ranking to 12th, high attention on Douyin, and the high match between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will advance from 401 to approximately 391; the range is 346–436, mainly driven by the improvement in school level and the continuous attraction of high-scoring candidates by popular engineering majors.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Class, HKU Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligent Systems Academician Special Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class Shenzhen Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- No other low-score majors currently available (in 2025, there were only 5 enrollment majors in the physics category, with a minimum ranking of 430, a small gap from the school line of 401, indicating intense competition for all majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 391 is within the range of 346–436. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 350 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Academician Special Class/Top Class; candidates with rankings between 350–420 should target Tier 2 Future Technology Top Class/AI Leading Class as their main direction; candidates with rankings above 420 should apply cautiously and consider pairing with other schools as a safety option. In 2026, all enrollment majors in the physics category at HIT are Engineering Experimental Classes, offering a wide range of majors with ample room for selection after enrollment.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1038 → 923 → 850 → 748, moving forward for four consecutive years, with a cumulative advance of about 290 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 748, showing a steady upward trend. The provincial enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) was 4 in 2022 → 5 in 2023 → 6 in 2024 → 7 in 2025 → 7 in 2026. After three consecutive years of expansion, it remains stable in 2026, and the stable plan has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, a member of the C9 League. Ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country. Although liberal arts are not the main strength of the university, the overall level of the school still has a strong appeal to liberal arts candidates. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed. The overall popularity on Douyin ranks 10th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 4.539 million, indicating relatively high overall attention. No abnormal signals related to liberal arts admissions have been observed. Management Science and Engineering is rated A (fifth round), highly correlated with the liberal arts enrollment major of Economics and Management Experimental Class. Although Business Administration, Applied Economics, and other economics and management disciplines are not on HIT's A- list, the overall engineering cross-management strength of the school is strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of economics/management/business administration majors is mixed and stable overall. The estimated number of history category candidates in Guizhou Province for 2026 is about 90,600 (slightly up from 90,100 in 2025), leading to slightly intensified competition. Cross-provincial enrollment: in 2025, the liberal arts enrollment in Guizhou Province accounted for about 0.3% (7 out of the national total plan). The number of enrolled students is extremely small, and ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by the application decisions of individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 748, stable enrollment plan, slight increase in history category candidates, and the continuous four-year forward trend of liberal arts rankings, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 will move forward from 748 to approximately 733. The range is 649–817, mainly driven by the ongoing forward trend and volatility due to the very small number of enrolled students.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 733 is within the range of 649–817. In 2026, HIT will only enroll 7 students in Guizhou Province for the liberal arts major of Economics and Management Experimental Class (Intelligent Social Governance), with a very small number of students. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 700 actively apply; candidates with rankings between 700–800 can try to aim for it; candidates with rankings above 800 should be cautious and consider pairing with other schools of the same level as a safety option. This major includes multiple directions such as Business Administration, Accounting, Law, and International Organizations and Global Governance, with free choice after enrollment.
